PubMed ID: 22955639. 2012/09/06 00:00. BACKGROUND: The commissioning accuracy of Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy 
(VMAT) need to be evaluated.
OBJECTIVE: To test and evaluate commissioning accuracy o
evidence.source_title: Application of AAPM TG 119 to volumetric arc therapy (VMAT).
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 22955639. 2012/09/06 00:00. BACKGROUND: The commissioning accuracy of Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy 
(VMAT) need to be evaluated.
OBJECTIVE: To test and evaluate commissioning accuracy of VMAT based on the TG 
119 protocols at local institution.
MATERIAL AND METHODS: The phantom, structure sets, VMAT and IMRT beam parameter 
setup, dose prescriptions and planning objectives were following TG 119 
guidelines to create local treatment plans of VMAT and IMRT. The local planning 
resul
